descriptions.text: モンスターファーム エクスプローラーは、テクモの1987年のNESゲーム「ソロモンの鍵」のアップデート版であり、「モンスターファーム」シリーズの環境、キャラクター、モンスターが登場します。このゲームはアクション要素を含むプラットフォーマーです。各レベルでは、制限時間内にパズルを解く必要があり、成功したプレイヤーには次のレベルを開くための鍵が与えられます。ほとんどのレベルでは悪いモンスターが攻撃してくるため、各レベルで鍵に到達するためにブロックを移動させるだけでなく、プレイヤーは悪いモンスターを倒して自分が殺されないようにする必要があります。出会うことのできる良いモンスターや、いくつかの隠されたボーナスレベル、ボーナスアイテム、そして宝物も見つかります。

Solomon (), also called Jedidiah, was a king of ancient Israel, according to the Hebrew Bible. The successor of his father David, he is described as the penultimate ruler of all Twelve Tribes of Israel under a united Israel and Judah. His reign is hypothesized to have lasted from c. 970–931 BCE. According to the biblical narrative, his reign brought commercial prosperity through alliances and trade, but his accumulation of wealth, horses, and foreign wives, many of whom introduced idolatry, led to divine punishment. After Solomon's death, his son Rehoboam’s harsh policies led the northern Israelites to reject the Davidic line and follow Jeroboam, splitting the kingdom into Israel in the north and Judah in the south, according to the Hebrew Bible.
Considered a Jewish prophet, Solomon is portrayed as wealthy, wise, powerful, and a dedicated follower of Yahweh (God), as attested by the eponymous Solomon's Temple. He is also traditionally regarded as the author of the biblical books of Proverbs, Ecclesiastes, and Song of Songs. He is also the subject of many later references and legends, most notably in the Testament of Solomon, part of biblical apocrypha from the 1st century CE.
